'''âh-m-r''' ('''kahamar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruggedise|ruggedise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruggedise|ruggedise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| kahamar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihamar|thihamar]] || [[word:jihamar|jihamar]] || [[word:shihamar|shihamar]] || [[word:kihamar|kihamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhamar|thuthuhamar]] || [[word:jujuhamar|jujuhamar]] || [[word:shushuhamar|shushuhamar]] || [[word:kukuhamar|kukuhamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhamar|thuhamar]] || [[word:juhamar|juhamar]] || [[word:shuhamar|shuhamar]] || [[word:kuhamar|kuhamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhamar|thuhamar]] || [[word:juhamar|juhamar]] || [[word:shuhamar|shuhamar]] || [[word:kuhamar|kuhamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehamar|thehamar]] || [[word:jehamar|jehamar]] || [[word:shehamar|shehamar]] || [[word:kehamar|kehamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohamar|thothohamar]] || [[word:jojohamar|jojohamar]] || [[word:shoshohamar|shoshohamar]] || [[word:kokohamar|kokohamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohamar|thohamar]] || [[word:johamar|johamar]] || [[word:shohamar|shohamar]] || [[word:kohamar|kohamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohamar|thohamar]] || [[word:johamar|johamar]] || [[word:shohamar|shohamar]] || [[word:kohamar|kohamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhamar|thĂŠhamar]] || [[word:jĂŠhamar|jĂŠhamar]] || [[word:shĂŠhamar|shĂŠhamar]] || [[word:kĂŠhamar|kĂŠhamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahamar|thathahamar]] || [[word:jajahamar|jajahamar]] || [[word:shashahamar|shashahamar]] || [[word:kakahamar|kakahamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahamar|thahamar]] || [[word:jahamar|jahamar]] || [[word:shahamar|shahamar]] || [[word:kahamar|kahamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahamar|thahamar]] || [[word:jahamar|jahamar]] || [[word:shahamar|shahamar]] || [[word:kahamar|kahamar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahamar|shahamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahamar|goshahamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahamar|gokishahamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahamarnĂŒ|shahamarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahamarnknĂŒ|goshahamarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamarnĂŒ|gokishahamarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahamarshĂ«|shahamarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahamarnkshĂ«|goshahamarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahamarshĂ«|gokishahamarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamaro|shahamaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamarnkro|goshahamarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamaro|gokishahamaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamarmu|shahamarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamarnkmu|goshahamarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamarmu|gokishahamarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahamarsher|shahamarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahamarnksher|goshahamarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahamarsher|gokishahamarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahamarng|shahamarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahamarnkng|goshahamarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahamarng|gokishahamarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahamarya|shahamarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahamarnkya|goshahamarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahamarya|gokishahamarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahamaryam|shahamaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahamarnkyam|goshahamarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahamaryam|gokishahamaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamarnĂŒshĂ«|shahamarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahamarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahamarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamarnĂŒro|shahamarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamarnknĂŒro|goshahamarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamarnĂŒro|gokishahamarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamarnĂŒmu|shahamarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamarnknĂŒmu|goshahamarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamarnĂŒmu|gokishahamarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamarshĂ«nĂŒ|shahamarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahamarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahamarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamarshĂ«ro|shahamarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamarnkshĂ«ro|goshahamarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamarshĂ«ro|gokishahamarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamarshĂ«mu|shahamarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamarnkshĂ«mu|goshahamarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamarshĂ«mu|gokishahamarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamaronĂŒ|shahamaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamarnkronĂŒ|goshahamarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamaronĂŒ|gokishahamaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamaroshĂ«|shahamaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamarnkroshĂ«|goshahamarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamaroshĂ«|gokishahamaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamaromu|shahamaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamarnkromu|goshahamarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamaromu|gokishahamaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamarmunĂŒ|shahamarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamarnkmunĂŒ|goshahamarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamarmunĂŒ|gokishahamarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamarmushĂ«|shahamarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamarnkmushĂ«|goshahamarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamarmushĂ«|gokishahamarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamarmuro|shahamarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamarnkmuro|goshahamarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamarmuro|gokishahamarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
